# Mass Transfer {#sec-mass}

## Advection

<!-- Simple bulk flow. Include note on dispersion. -->

## Diffusion and Fick's laws {#sec-fick}

<!-- Diffusivity D depends on both the diffusing species and the medium.
     Approximate ranges for gases, liquids, solids. -->

## Convection

## Mass transfer coefficient approach

## Interphase mass transfer {#sec-interphase}

<!-- Transfer through an interface between two phases.
     This section likely needs more depth than the others given the topic's importance. -->

## Linking equations

<!-- Generally not needed; mass is mass. -->

## Example: dissolved oxygen transport and consumption
